description: The Random Point On Cube node returns a random float3 value of a point on the shell of a unit cube centered at ``[0; 0; 0]``.

fields.* ([[Type:float3|float3]]): A random point on the shell of a unit cube. This will be a float3 where one value is ``-0.5`` or ``0.5`` and the other two values are between ``-0.5`` and ``0.5``.
